category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Morocco IMANOR NM standards, import conformity, energy labelling, and refrigerant requirements.

title.en: China-to-Morocco Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入摩洛哥：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入摩洛哥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Morocco's IMANOR NM standards (adopting IEC 60335-2-24), Ministry of Industry import conformity / CMIM-type attestation, appliance energy-efficiency labelling, R-600a refrigerant handling, and in-country importer requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与摩洛哥IMANOR NM标准（采纳IEC 60335-2-24）、工业部进口符合性/CMIM类证明、家电能效标识、R-600a制冷剂处理及本地进口商要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與摩洛哥IMANOR NM標準（採納IEC 60335-2-24）、工業部進口符合性/CMIM類證明、家電能效標識、R-600a製冷劑處理及本地進口商要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Moroccan legislation, IMANOR NM standards, import-conformity (attestation/CMIM-type) procedures, energy-labelling rules, and refrigerant provisions with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行摩洛哥法律、IMANOR NM标准、进口符合性（证明/CMIM类）程序、能效标识规则及制冷剂条款。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行摩洛哥法律、IMANOR NM標準、進口符合性（證明/CMIM類）程序、能效標識規則及製冷劑條款。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four main Morocco compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety conformity to the Moroccan NM standard adopting IEC 60335-2-24 (NM IEC 60335-2-24), evidenced through IMANOR certification or a conformity attestation — CCC/GB 4706.13 is not automatically accepted; (2) mandatory import conformity assessment for regulated electrical products run by the Ministry of Industry and Trade (attestation/CMIM-type verification of conformity at import), which has no direct Chinese export equivalent; (3) appliance energy-efficiency labelling under Moroccan energy-efficiency rules administered by AMEE/Ministry — distinct from the China Energy Label; and (4) an in-country importer (importateur) of record, since Morocco channels regulated imports through a resident responsible party. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned (Morocco follows IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant charge limits), but Morocco has no EU-style horizontal RoHS / F-Gas / outdoor-noise marking regime — those map to electrical-safety and import-conformity instruments instead.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大摩洛哥合规差距：（1）电气安全须符合摩洛哥采纳IEC 60335-2-24的NM标准（NM IEC 60335-2-24），并通过IMANOR认证或符合性证明加以证明——CCC/GB 4706.13不被自动接受；（2）受管制电气产品须经工业和贸易部主管的强制进口符合性评定（进口环节的证明/CMIM类符合性核验），中国出口端无直接对应制度；（3）家电须依据摩洛哥能效规则（由AMEE/相关部委管理）进行能效标识，区别于中国能效标识；（4）须有本地进口商（importateur）作为登记责任方，因摩洛哥受管制进口须经由境内常驻责任方办理。R-600a制冷剂具备良好条件（摩洛哥沿用IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂充注量限值），但摩洛哥没有欧盟式的横向RoHS/氟气体/室外噪声标识制度——上述事项改由电气安全和进口符合性工具承接。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大摩洛哥合規差距：（1）電氣安全須符合摩洛哥採納IEC 60335-2-24的NM標準（NM IEC 60335-2-24），並通過IMANOR認證或符合性證明加以證明——CCC/GB 4706.13不被自動接受；（2）受管制電氣產品須經工業和貿易部主管的強制進口符合性評定（進口環節的證明/CMIM類符合性核驗），中國出口端無直接對應制度；（3）家電須依據摩洛哥能效規則（由AMEE/相關部委管理）進行能效標識，區別於中國能效標識；（4）須有本地進口商（importateur）作為登記責任方，因摩洛哥受管制進口須經由境內常駐責任方辦理。R-600a製冷劑具備良好條件（摩洛哥沿用IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑充注量限值），但摩洛哥沒有歐盟式的橫向RoHS/氟氣體/室外噪聲標識制度——上述事項改由電氣安全和進口符合性工具承接。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator (IMANOR, Ministry of Industry and Trade, AMEE, ANRT), standards body, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
